## Change summary

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm format`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Connector or policy checklist

- [ ] I declared every provider scope and endpoint, or this does not affect a connector.
- [ ] I added deterministic fixtures and source-linked evidence, or this does not affect a policy pack.
- [ ] I confirmed this change cannot mutate a provider in Phase 1.
- [ ] I used stable dependencies only.
